prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan metal cube
  - obj_1: small red metal cube
  - obj_2: large green metal sphere
  - obj_3: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_4: large gray rubber cylinder
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_6: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small green rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0001] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0002] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0003] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0007] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0008] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0009] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0010] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0011] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0012] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0013] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0014] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0015] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0016] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0017] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0018] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0019] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0020] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

- obj_0: large cyan metal cube
- obj_1: small red metal cube

- obj_5: large yellow metal cylinder

From the images, I need to estimate 3D positions of each object.

Looking at the images carefully:
- obj_0 (cyan cube): front-center area
- obj_1 (red cube): middle area, slightly right
- obj_2 (green metal sphere): far back-left
- obj_3 (cyan cylinder): left-center or back area
- obj_4 (gray cylinder): center
- obj_5 (yellow cylinder): front/right area
- obj_6 (small brown cylinder): left side or front
- obj_7 (brown cylinder): right-center
- obj_8 (green rubber sphere): right side

Distance obj_0 to obj_1: moderate distance (they appear somewhat close in the scene)

Let me estimate positions from image 4 (which seems clearest):
- obj_0 (cyan cube): left-center, front
- obj_1 (red cube): center-right

- obj_3 (cyan cylinder): back-right
- obj_4 (gray cylinder): center
- obj_5 (yellow cylinder): front-center
- obj_6 (small brown cylinder): far left
- obj_7 (brown cylinder): right-center
- obj_8 (green rubber sphere): right

obj_0 to obj_1 distance: ~medium (maybe 3-4 units)
